title: Neo:N's Fakedex
description: This is an addon for Cobblemon that will eventually add in an entire region's worth of Fakemon!
body:
This project aims to add a plethora of new Fakemon into your game!

![A Brand new Starter Trio!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/698cf5f38d692086c57efa821cb002d21f72e2bf_0.webp)

-----------------------------------------------------
# Features and Additions

The latest version of this pack includes:
- **35** completely original Fakemon!
- Fully functional spawning mechanics! All Fakemon added are obtainable in survival mode.
- Complete custom movesets, animations, and shiny variants for all Fakemon added

These mons are all modeled, textured, and animated in Blockbench by Neo:N Riftborne, and were originally designed by him and a few collaborators (who wish to remain anonymous).

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Version Compatibility

This addon is developed using Cobblemon's **Fabric** branch. Don't worry though, it's also compatible with **Forge** clients. At this point, this addon has not been tested with a NeoForge client yet, although I don't see any reason why it shouldn't work there too.

Of course, the latest version of the Cobblemon mod is also required for addon to function.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# How to Install

This addon is designed to be functional as both a DATAPACK and a RESOURCEPACK. 

Before creating a world, navigate to your Resource Packs screen and add this addon as a resource pack. Make sure to enable it!

When creating your world, navigate to the datapacks screen. Drop the addon in there and enable it as well.

**IMPORTANT: THE ADDON SHOULD BE PRESENT IN BOTH PLACES FOR IT TO FUNCTION PROPERLY.**

Alternatively, you can add this pack to an existing world by locating its directory: 
(.minecraft > saves > [your world] > datapacks) 
and dropping the pack in there. Then enter the world and type /reload to enable the addon.

If you did everything right, you should start seeing Fakemon spawning in your world!

-----------------------------------------------------

NOTE: All Fakemon in this pack are subject to be largely modified or even removed in future updates. I'm not sure how this will affect players updating from older versions, but rest assured it will not break your worlds!
